examples: When drinking beer, burp as loudly as you can.
Animals produce methane, which is another dangerous greenhouse gas when they burp and fart.
Unlike in some other parts of East Asia, it is also considered a bad manner to burp in the West.
This is not the first time a methane burp has been blamed for an extinction.
Two and a half million listeners, the producer says, which causes me to burp up my Wheaties.
